channel.description: Recent content in Claude on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Anthropic Gives Free Access
item.description: Anthropic gives teachers free access to premium Claude features for education purposes, details here

item.title: Apple's Digital ID in Claude: A New Era of Identity Verification?
item.description: Apple's Digital ID may soon integrate with Claude, revolutionizing digital identity verification. Explore the implications and potential use cases here.
